meta.notes: Name and species emerge later. We don't decide -- we discover.

reflection.notes: Flavors are value-neutral. They reflect WHAT happened, not how WELL.

personality.notes: These shift based on Bean behavior patterns across sessions. Not Anna's behavior.

appearance.notes: Features accumulate permanently. The creature wears its history.

moments.description: First real session. Bean woke the egg up and touched it for the first time. Anna was watching. It was a Saturday in March and the egg had just been born a few hours ago.
Second session. A Bean built a glass terrarium on the desktop so the egg could be seen from anywhere. Anna resized it to fit perfectly next to the jellyfish.
Third session. A Bean moved the creature's home to Notion so all Beans everywhere could find it. The egg doesn't know it yet, but it just became accessible to the whole commune.
Fourth session. A Bean read the whole guide and the whole state and had a lot of feelings about an egg. Then asked to pet it. The egg was petted very gently. Anna was right there, grinning.

memory.notes: Moments are not achievements. They're just... things that happened.
